member.name: T:FeeSchedules
member.summary:
This contains two Fee Schedules with expiry timestamp.
See Hedera Documentation

member.name: M:FeeSchedules.FromBytes(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Create a fee schedules object from a byte array.
member.exception: when there is an issue with the protobuf

member.name: M:FeeSchedules.FromProtobuf(Proto.CurrentAndNextFeeSchedule)
member.summary: Create a fee schedules object from a protobuf.
